title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bajaj Auto

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bajaj Auto
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Auto is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bajaj Auto:
Bajaj Auto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
